title: Microsoft Teams Login Issue
description: Troubleshooting steps for users unable to sign into Microsoft Teams.

steps.title: Clear Teams Cache
steps.instruction: Completely quit Teams. On Windows: Press Win+R, type `%appdata%\Microsoft\Teams`, and delete everything in the folder. Then restart Teams.

steps.title: Sign Out and Sign Back In
steps.instruction: Open the Teams app, click your profile picture, select 'Sign out', then sign back in using your company credentials.

steps.title: Check Web Client
steps.instruction: Try logging into Teams on the web (teams.microsoft.com) to see if it's an app-specific issue or an account issue.

steps.title: Ensure Software is Updated
steps.instruction: Check for updates by clicking your profile picture and selecting 'Check for updates' in the Teams app.

steps.title: Contact IT Support
steps.instruction: If you still cannot log in on both the desktop app and the web browser, your account may be locked. Please raise a ticket.
